headline: Dollar General Corporation Announces Webcast of its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
summary: GOODLETTSVILLE, Tenn., May 05, 2026--Dollar General Corporation (NYSE: DG) today announced that it plans to release its financial results for the fiscal 2026 first quarter ended May 1, 2026, on June 2, 2026.

headline: 'The stock market is not the economy,' says Rebecca Homkes
summary: Strategist Rebecca Homkes weighs in on the broader impacts of the Iran War, warning against trying to correlate U.S. equity indices with the economy and exploring the real impact of AI on the labor market.
